title: The Rise of Semantic Layers in BI
summary: Why defining a single source of truth is the most critical step in your 2024 BI roadmap.

sections.content: Why defining a single source of truth is the most critical step in your 2024 BI roadmap.
Semantic layers abstract the complexity of underlying data models while providing consistent business definitions across all dashboards.

cta.title: Ready to Modernize Your BI Stack?
cta.subtitle: Implement semantic layers for consistent, trustworthy analytics.
